signup.title: Register, Calculate, Evaluate
signup.description: We will help you keep a daily record of your diet and exercises in the easiest and fastest way you have ever seen.

name.label: What should we call you?
name.error: Please tell us what we should call you.

errors.userExists: This email is already registered. Please log in.
errors.serverError: An error occurred while processing your request.
errors.connectionError: Could not connect to the server. Please check your connection and try again.

confirmation.title: Confirm your email
confirmation.description: Hello {name}, we sent a confirmation code to {email}. Please enter the code below:

errors.connectionError: Could not connect to the server. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.invalidCode: Invalid code. Please check and try again.
errors.expiredCode: Code expired. Please request a new code.
errors.userNotFound: User not found. Please try signing up again.
errors.userAlreadyConfirmed: This user is already confirmed. You can log in.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a code to reset your password.

errors.userNotFound: No account found with this email.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.connectionError: Could not connect to the server.

resetPassword.title: Create new password
resetPassword.description: We sent a code to {destination}. Enter it below with your new password.

errors.invalidCode: Invalid code. Please check and try again.
errors.expiredCode: Code expired. Please request a new code.
errors.connectionError: Could not connect to the server.

resetPassword.success: Password reset successfully! You can now log in.

home.ready: You are authenticated and ready to start!

validation.minLength: This field must have at least {min} characters.
